title: Certificate
description: Schema for single-page landscape completion or training certificates. Validates data.json for professional certificate generation.

recipient.description: Full name of the certificate recipient

course_name.description: Name of the course, program, or achievement

completion_date.description: Completion date in human-readable format, e.g. 'April 6, 2026'

description.description: Description of what was completed or achieved

org_logo.description: Path to organization logo image (relative to pack root)

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle below the main heading, e.g. 'Certificate of Completion'
